sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Real Sociedad has seen a mixed form recently, winning 3 of their last 5 matches. Celta Vigo, however, remains strong, with 4 wins in their last 5 encounters.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head
sections.text: In their last two meetings, both teams fought fiercely, with a draw and a narrow victory for Celta Vigo. This suggests a competitive rivalry.

sections.subtitle: Probabilities
sections.text: Sofascore predicts a higher likelihood of an away win for Celta Vigo at 44%, compared to 29% for Real Sociedad and 27% for a draw.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: Real Sociedad took the lead early in the match with a goal from Mikel Oyarzabal in the 17th minute. The first half saw Real Sociedad controlling significant periods but Celta Vigo maintained better possession overall and created more attacking opportunities.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The initial phases of the match were dominated by Celta Vigo, who had multiples spells of attacking momentum, particularly in the early minutes. However, Real Sociedad gained a strong foothold as the first half progressed, displaying moments of sustained pressure, especially around their goal. Celta Vigo did manage to shift momentum back towards them towards the end of the half, but were unable to capitalize effectively.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team form and strategy
halftimeSections.text: Real Sociedad have exhibited resilience and well-structured defense, which is aided by their expansive attacking style. Celta Vigo's strategy leans heavily on ball possession, looking for gaps in Sociedad's defense, yet they must convert their possession into more concrete chances to equalize.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half prediction
halftimeSections.text: Given their momentum shifts towards the end of the half, Celta Vigo may start the second half with intent to level the score. Real Sociedad will likely focus on maintaining their lead and could look for counter-attacks. The match is finely balanced, with potential for goals from both sides.
